== Notes for [[Item:Q116031|Q116031]] ==

Señor de Almonacer, Mayordomo of King Don Alfonso VII de Castilla and governor of Leon representing King Don Fernando II.
--------------------
FUENTES:

-http://freepages.genealogy.rootsweb.com/~pinofiel/haro_osorio.htm
--------------------
Ponce Giraldo de Cabrera

== Sources ==

[http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/VIZCAYA.htm#InigoLopezdied1077 FMG MedLands Vizcaya]

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
